_schema.description: Each workspace entry in the 'workspaces' array follows this shape

workspace.name: string — kebab-case workspace name
workspace.type: string — one of: webapp, api, agent, skill, mcp-server, project
workspace.path: string — absolute path to workspace directory

stack.runtime: string — python, node, php, go, rust, etc.
stack.framework: string — fastapi, express, next, laravel, etc.
